BUILD_ENV_PATH_MODULE_DEPEND.DESCRIPTION: Get all relative path and module path use for docker include module and store it in .env file in module

BUILD_YML_MODULE_DEPEND.DESCRIPTION: Automation combine all yml at module and all component depend and save it in build file for run or docker compose

README_LANGUAGE.DESCRIPTION: List language to automatic build readme.md in each language in each module

DATABASE_MODULE_NAME.DESCRIPTION: Name of database you are using

DATABASE_MODULE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Type of database you are using
